job.basePrompt: Football results digest. English. Headlines name the match and result.

items.title: Arsenal 2-1 Chelsea
items.content: Late goal from substitute seals win for Arsenal in derby.

items.title: Liverpool 3-0 Everton
items.content: Dominant performance from Liverpool in the Merseyside derby.

items.title: Man City 1-1 Tottenham
items.content: Tottenham come from behind to secure a draw at the Etihad.

items.title: Real Madrid 4-2 Valencia
items.content: Real Madrid run riot at the Bernabeu despite late Valencia push.

items.title: Barcelona 2-0 Sevilla
items.content: Barcelona keep clean sheet against Sevilla at home.

items.title: Bayern 3-1 Dortmund
items.content: Der Klassiker goes to Bayern after strong second half showing.

items.title: PSG 2-2 Marseille
items.content: Le Classique ends in a dramatic 2-2 draw in Paris.

items.title: Juventus 1-0 Inter
items.content: Juventus edge past Inter with a single goal at the Allianz Stadium.

items.title: Ajax 2-1 PSV
items.content: Ajax come from behind to beat PSV in the Dutch classic.

items.title: Porto 3-2 Benfica
items.content: Porto edge Benfica in a five-goal thriller in the Portuguese classic.
